---
title: "Adapting, Revising, and Remixing"
format: html

previous:
  href: "Creator-Sharing & Versioning.html"
  text: "Sharing & Versioning"

next:
  href: "Creator-Ethics of Reuse.html"
  text: "Ethics of Reuse"
---

Adaptation examples include:

-   translating content;
-   updating outdated statistics;
-   adding examples relevant to local context;
-   integrating multimedia or interactive components.

When remixed with other OERs, check licence compatibility — particularly CC BY 'SA' and 'ND' conditions and combinations.

Maintain attribution and any required notices of change.

[![](images/clipboard-2765196364.png){fig-alt="Go to next page: Creator-Ethics%20of%20Reuse.html" fig-align="center" width="50"}](/OERs%20for%20creators/Creator-Ethics%20of%20Reuse.html)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: nav-footer
```{=html}
<a href="{{< meta previous.href >}}" aria-label="Go to previous page: {{< meta previous.text >}}">
  <span aria-hidden="true">«</span> {{< meta previous.text >}}
</a>

<a href="{{< meta next.href >}}" aria-label="Go to next page: {{< meta next.text >}}">
  {{< meta next.text >}} <span aria-hidden="true">»</span>
</a>
```
:::
